title: VACUUM results in "database disk image is malformed" for PRIMARY KEY with duplicate column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, PRIMARY KEY(c1, c1));

key_bug_features: VACUUM with duplicate PRIMARY KEY column causes corruption
